g.text: Phase 3 — complete business story across all 10 queries
Nov 2017 revenue: $1.17M — highest single month in dataset — 53% MoM jump. Classic Black Friday effect.

svg.text: Finding 4 — credit card dominates, installments are key

g.text: Offering more installment plans = more conversions.

svg.text: Finding 5 — seller revenue is also concentrated

g.text: Top seller alone: $229K. Top 3 sellers: SP, BA, SP — all in the south. 90%+ sellers are from SP state.

svg.text: Finding 6 — the retention crisis (connects all findings)

g.text: AL state has 21% late delivery rate → worst reviews → customers never return.
The delivery problem IS the retention problem. Fix delivery → fix retention → fix growth.

svg.text: How to present Phase 3 in an interview

g.text: "I analysed 98K orders across 2 years. The business grew 13,000% from 2016 to 2017 but
growth slowed to 21% in 2018 — a sign the easy acquisition phase is over.
SP, RJ, and MG generate 66% of revenue despite being 3 of 27 states.
Most critically, I found that a 1-3 day delivery delay triples bad review rates — and with only
3.1% repeat customers, delivery quality is the single biggest lever for growth."
